nasb.text: because they rejected My ordinances, and as for My statutes, they did not walk in them; they even profaned My sabbaths, for their heart continually went after their idols.

esv.text: because they rejected my rules and did not walk in my statutes, and profaned my Sabbaths; for their heart went after their idols.

cnv.text: 因為他們棄絕了我的典章，沒有遵行我的律例，褻瀆了我的安息日；他們的心隨從自己的偶像。

ccb.text: 因为他们不遵守我的典章，不顺从我的律例，亵渎我的安息日，心恋偶像。
